summary: Excellent matrix recording of a quintessential Fall‑79 show with standout performances of Cold Rain, Dancing > Franklin's, Scarlet Begonias and more.
review: Both reviewers rave about the newly mastered source, calling it a breakthrough in clarity that finally does justice to this legendary fall ’79 concert. The performance is described as bursting with energy – from the opening Cold Rain & Snow through the wild Deal, sparkling Dancing > Franklin's sequence, and soaring versions of Scarlet Begonias, Fire on the Mountain, Truckin' and a peak reminiscent of the famed 10/27/79 Other One.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently 5‑star reviews highlight an outstanding musical show and a newly mastered matrix source that resolves previous audio shortcomings.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Newly mastered ‘secret sauce’ source delivers crystal‑clear balance; reviewers note it finally captures the full energy of the night where earlier sources fell short.

standout_songs: Dancing in the Street > Franklin's Tower
show_quality.setlist_flow: First set opens strong with Cold Rain, flows through a dynamic Dancing > Franklin's sequence and a wild Deal; second half builds into high‑energy peaks with Scarlet, Fire, Truckin' and an Other One climax that recalls the iconic 10/27/79 performance.
